synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-22982 Important: Oracle Linux 7 python-kdcproxy security update
description:
[0.3.2-3.0.1]
- Use DNS discovery for declared realms only (CVE-2025-59088) [Orabug: 38745300]
- Fix DoS vulnerability based on unbounded TCP buffering (CVE-2025-59089)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-22982

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-22982.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 7 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
python-kdcproxy-0.3.2-3.0.1.el7.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol7/SRPMS-updates/python-kdcproxy-0.3.2-3.0.1.el7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-59088
CVE-2025-59089




Description of changes:

[0.3.2-3.0.1]
- Use DNS discovery for declared realms only (CVE-2025-59088) [Orabug: 38745300]
- Fix DoS vulnerability based on unbounded TCP buffering (CVE-2025-59089)
